aiSettings.assistantEnabledDescription: Lets super-admins ask questions and act on live datacenter data via the AI chat widget.
aiSettings.predictiveAnalysisEnabledDescription: Runs a scheduled job that reasons over infrastructure data to flag risks before they become failures.
aiSettings.autonomousActionsEnabledDescription: Allows the AI to apply remediation actions (status changes, urgent interventions) on its own, without waiting for human approval. Off by default.
aiSettings.confirmAutonomousMessage: The AI will be able to change equipment status and create urgent interventions automatically, without human approval. Every action is still logged and auditable. Do you want to proceed?
aiSettings.saveError: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
aiSettings.loadError: Unable to load AI settings. Please check your connection and try again.
